question: What is the difference between the average of September 1896 until December 1896 and the average of January 1897 until April 1897?

steps.text: Select the four bars from September 1896 through December 1896 and compute their mean fatality rate.
Select the four bars from January 1897 through April 1897 and compute their mean fatality rate.
Subtract the earlier-period mean from the later-period mean.
